    def search_and_verify_user(self):
    
        # ✅ Ensure we are logged in
        if "dashboard" not in self.page.url and "admin" not in self.page.url:
            raise Exception("Not logged in!")
    
        # Navigate to Admin
        self.page.get_by_role("link", name="Admin").click()
    
        # User Management tab
        self.page.locator(
            "span.oxd-topbar-body-nav-tab-item",
            has_text="User Management"
        ).click()
    
        # Search
        search_box = self.page.locator('input.oxd-input').nth(1)
